languages.text: {n}С ехидным бинарным шипением Паскаль констатирует:{/n} "Попытка повторной диагностики машинного духа генетором Фебруса зафиксирована. Ее результат внесен в аналитику его компетентности с целью пересмотра оной".

{n}Emitting a snide binharic hiss, Pasqal declares,{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."
languages.original_text: {n}С ехидным бинарным шипением Паскаль констатирует:{/n} "Попытка повторной диагностики машинного духа генетором Фебруса зафиксирована. Ее результат внесен в аналитику его компетентности с целью пересмотра оной".

traits.locale_text: {n}Emitting a malicious binharic hiss, Pasqal declares:{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

{n}Emitting a malicious binharic hiss, Pasqal declares:{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

{n}Emitting a snide binharic hiss, Pasqal declares,{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

{n}Emitting a snide binharic hiss, Pasqal declares,{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

languages.text: {n}Con un siseo binario molesto, Pasqal declara:{/n} «Se ha registrado el intento de reevaluación del espíritu máquina por parte del genetor Februs. El resultado queda marcado en su análisis de eficacia, a falta de una revisión formal de su competencia».
languages.original_text: {n}Emitting a snide binharic hiss, Pasqal declares,{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

traits.locale_text: {n}Con un siseo binario molesto, Pasqal declara:{/n} «Se ha registrado el intento de reevaluación del espíritu máquina por parte del genetor Februs. El resultado queda marcado en su análisis de eficacia, a falta de una revisión formal de su competencia».

languages.text: {n}帕斯卡发出嘲讽的二进制嘶鸣，宣布道：{/n}“已记录基因士费布鲁斯试图重新评估机魂的行为。相关结果已被计入其效率指标，有待对其能力进行正式审查。”
languages.original_text: {n}Emitting a snide binharic hiss, Pasqal declares,{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

traits.locale_text: {n}帕斯卡发出嘲讽的二进制嘶鸣，宣布道：{/n}“已记录基因士费布鲁斯试图重新评估机魂的行为。相关结果已被计入其效率指标，有待对其能力进行正式审查。”

languages.text: {n}Mit einem schneidenden binhärischen Zischen erklärt Pasqal:{/n} "Die versuchte Neubewertung des Maschinengeistes durch Genetor Februs wurde notiert. Das Ergebnis wurde in seiner Effizienzmetrik vermerkt und wartet auf eine formelle Prüfung seiner Kompetenz."
languages.original_text: {n}Emitting a snide binharic hiss, Pasqal declares,{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem schneidenden binhärischen Zischen erklärt Pasqal:{/n} "Die versuchte Neubewertung des Maschinengeistes durch Genetor Februs wurde notiert. Das Ergebnis wurde in seiner Effizienzmetrik vermerkt und wartet auf eine formelle Prüfung seiner Kompetenz."

languages.text: {n}Avec un sifflement binhaire sarcastique, Pasqal prend la parole :{/n} « La tentative avortée de réévaluation de l'esprit de la machine par le genetor Februs a été dûment enregistrée. Les résultats ont été joints à ses statistiques de performance dans l'attente d'un bilan complet de ses compétences. »
languages.original_text: {n}Emitting a snide binharic hiss, Pasqal declares,{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

traits.locale_text: {n}Avec un sifflement binhaire sarcastique, Pasqal prend la parole :{/n} « La tentative avortée de réévaluation de l'esprit de la machine par le genetor Februs a été dûment enregistrée. Les résultats ont été joints à ses statistiques de performance dans l'attente d'un bilan complet de ses compétences. »

languages.text: {n}Alaycı bir ikilidil tıslama çıkaran Pasqal konuşmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Genetör Februs'un Makine Ruhu'nun yeniden değerlendirilmesi girişimi kaydedildi. Yetkinliğinin resmî olarak incelenmesi gerçekleşene dek sonuç, verimlilik metriklerinde işaretlenmiştir."
languages.original_text: {n}Emitting a snide binharic hiss, Pasqal declares,{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

traits.locale_text: {n}Alaycı bir ikilidil tıslama çıkaran Pasqal konuşmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Genetör Februs'un Makine Ruhu'nun yeniden değerlendirilmesi girişimi kaydedildi. Yetkinliğinin resmî olarak incelenmesi gerçekleşene dek sonuç, verimlilik metriklerinde işaretlenmiştir."

languages.text: {n}パスカルは、悪意に満ちた二音のヒスを吐きながら宣言する。{/n}「ジェネトル・フェブルスの機械霊の再評価を試みたことは記録されている。その結果が彼の効率性指標にフラグが立てられ、彼の能力の正式なレビューが行われるまで、その結果が保留されている。」
languages.original_text: {n}Emitting a snide binharic hiss, Pasqal declares,{/n} "The attempted re-evaluation of the Machine Spirit by Genetor Februs has been logged. The outcome has been flagged in his efficiency metrics, pending a formal review of his competence."

traits.locale_text: {n}パスカルは、悪意に満ちた二音のヒスを吐きながら宣言する。{/n}「ジェネトル・フェブルスの機械霊の再評価を試みたことは記録されている。その結果が彼の効率性指標にフラグが立てられ、彼の能力の正式なレビューが行われるまで、その結果が保留されている。」
